name: Italian-Seasoned Bread Crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Save leftover bread slices and dry them until completely dry and crisp (place on counter or in an oven preheated to 250°F for about 15 minutes).
2. Using a food processor, blender, or rolling with waxed paper, make fine bread crumbs.
3. Store the breadcrumbs in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 2 months.
4. Mix 2 cups of breadcrumbs with Parmesan cheese, dried parsley, oregano, basil, garlic powder, and onion powder. Use as desired within 2 months.
